title: festuca rubra f. prolifera
intro: Festuca rubra f. prolifera, also known as red fescue, is a type of flowering grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Festuca rubra f. prolifera include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
